measurement_note: Size is the number of cells R*C. Each odd-width grid contains a zero-cost snake visiting every cell before ending at the destination. Following that path exposes weight-one alternatives across the matrix, creating a broad pending frontier. The 0-1 BFS reference processes O(RC) edges with a deque. A correct slower Dijkstra implementation keeps pending tuples in an unsorted list and scans it for the minimum before every extraction, accumulating superlinear work while completing the 9/25/49 square tiers.
